segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Hi, are you here for a student ID?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes. I'm a new PhD student, and I was told to come here after check-in.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Great. Can I see a photo ID?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Thanks. Can you confirm your full name?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Jongkuk Yi. The spelling should match my passport.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Perfect. We'll take a quick photo. You can stand against the wall there.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No problem. Should I take my glasses off?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. Also, will this card give me building access right away?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Library access starts today. Department access may take a day or two.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. Thanks for explaining that.
